programme.title: Iron Finger
programme.desc: Tough cop Bruce Li arrives back in town in time to investigate a series of odd murders. Victims have two pierce marks on their necks. The killer is an expert in the Iron Finger strike. The fights are fantastic with the two Bruce's and Ku Feng going at it and all are excellent.

programme.title: Cry Of The Penguins
programme.desc: Rejected by a young woman (Hayley Mills) in London, a scientist (John Hurt) retreats to Antarctica to study the penguin

programme.title: All For Her Majesty
programme.desc: Simon Templar is on holiday in Naples when a small uproar on a lunch table draws his attention. An English tourist attempts to greet an Italian businessman as an old friend, but the Italian refuses to acknowledge the greeting and claims never to have met him.

programme.title: Iron Finger
programme.desc: Tough cop Bruce Li arrives back in town in time to investigate a series of odd murders. Victims have two pierce marks on their necks. The killer is an expert in the Iron Finger strike. The fights are fantastic with the two Bruce's and Ku Feng going at it and all are excellent.

programme.title: Dua
programme.desc: Kisah Farhan yang kehilangan kembarnya Fahrin dalam satu kemalangan tragis. Dia kemudiannya mengambil-alih kehidupan Fahrin namun terperangkap dalam sebuah cinta tiga segi pula. Lakonan Eusoff Hashim dan Sharifah Sakinah.

programme.title: Racun Menantu
programme.desc: After marrying Zain, Sara lived in the same house with Pak Dolah, her father-in-law. Because of the family's grudge, Sara started making trouble by seducing her own father-in-law.

programme.title: Cupid
programme.desc: Kisah mengenai seorang ejen yang bekerja di sebuah syarikat penghancur jodoh yang ditugaskan untuk memikat seorang wanita supaya dapat melupakan suaminya yang telah diisytiharkan meninggal dunia. Namun dia jatuh cinta pada wanita tersebut

programme.title: We’ll be back at 6.00am
programme.desc: We’ll be back at 6.00am

programme.title: Luar Biasa
programme.desc: Kisah yang diinspirasikan daripada pemenang pingat emas Paralimpik, Mohamad Ridzuan yang menghadapi penyakit 'Cebral Palsy' dan abangnya yang sentiasa ada di sisinya.

programme.title: Sekolah Api
programme.desc: Api, gangster yang meningkat naik cuba memenuhi amanat arwah neneknya untuk menghabiskan SPM. Dia jatuh cinta dengan guru Bahasa Inggeris dan sanggup melakukan apa saja untuk memenangi hati guru tersebut.

programme.title: Balapan
programme.desc: Kisah empat orang remaja yang telah menjadi musuh sejak sekian lama di lapangan balapan acara pecut 100meter peringkat daerah Selangor dan akhirnya menjadi sahabat seperjuangan.

programme.title: Lampu Merah
programme.desc: Si lelaki sukakan si perempuan, tanpa sedar yang si perempuan itu psiko dan obses dengan cintanya. Cara untuk selamatkan diri hanya dengan jatuh cinta dengan si perempuan semula.

programme.title: Bini Aku Dari...
programme.desc: Lydia dan Rudy telah pun berkahwin. Lydia nak anak walaupun Rudy belum bersedia lagi. Perangai Lydia makin menjadi- jadi apabila mengikut hukum hakam dari kakiberamal.com.

programme.title: Tebus
programme.desc: Anak perempuan Mikail telah di culik dan untuk menyelamatkan anaknya dia cuba mengimbau kembali sejarah lampau dirinya ketika menyertai kumpulan gangster.

programme.title: Survival 486
programme.desc: Syuhada going hiking to Gunung Tahan with her friends. Unfortunately, she got lost and fell into a deep hole and trapped there for 19 days.

programme.title: Cik Paris Diva Kampung
programme.desc: Zulaikha merupakan seroang gadis bandar yang mencabar diri untuk hidup di kampung lalu terpikat dengan jejaka kampung yang berjaya menawan hatinya.

programme.title: Budak Dari Tak Bai
programme.desc: Melalui kehidupan yang getir, Johari meninggalkan Tak Bai pada zaman kanak-kanak ke Kota Bharu. Peristiwa hitam membuatkannya hanyut dalam dunia gelap. Dilakonkan oleh Kamal Adli dan Nabila Huda.

programme.title: Delen
programme.desc: Mengisahkan tentang Delen yang mula rasa terancam apabila Emily mula menyukai pelajar baru bernama Robert. Sejak itu, bermulalah persaingan antara Delen dan Robert demi merebut cinta Emily.

programme.title: Bro Jenin
programme.desc: Kisah Jenin yang telah masuk ke zaman kini. Dia berjumpa dengan seorang animator, Emily. Wujud perbezaan pendapat maka terjadi lah kisah2 lucu dan akhirnya Jenin terpaksa pulang ke tempat asalnya.

However, Casper scares away a banker who is coming to foreclose on the woman's house, and this wins her heart for Casper.

programme.desc: Nick slick and a bunch of poachers are out hunting leopards in Africa. Now it's time for Gisele and the Green Team to stop them.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage - Big Bad Car - EP104
programme.desc: Klaus's claim of being the fastest car in the world is put to the test.

programme.title: Thomas Edison's Secret Lab - No Volts for Von Bolt / Dunkin’ Zombies - EP104
programme.desc: During a sailing trip, Von Bolt begins to malfunction, endangering ALVA and Edison, so the Secret Lab Kids investigate elements, compounds and alloys to diagnose the problem. / When a virus turns JD into a donut-craving zombie, Angie has to come up with not only a cure, but an inoculation against the virus. Fortunately, Jonas Salk can help.

programme.title: The Traveller: The Valley of Fear
programme.desc: In the Basque Country, Captain Yann Kandinsky investigates the disappearance of a young bookseller whose case mirrors a murder from twenty years earlier. All evidence points to the same man—Yves Cesnoz, convicted of the first crime—but Kandinsky believes the real killer is still at large.

programme.title: Until Tomorrow
programme.desc: A single mother's courage is tested when she resorts to desperate measures to hide her illegitimate child from her parents.

programme.title: Wonderfully Beautiful
programme.desc: Ranging from a 60-year-old retiree who no longer finds herself desirable to a daughter trying to make her breakthrough as a model, five women of different ages confront their self-image and the expectation they have for themselves and the people around them.

programme.title: Like Crazy
programme.desc: Two mental patients, a motor-mouthed fantasist and a tattooed introvert, who met at a community hospital, fled the hospital to embark on a road trip from Tuscany to Rome, in search of love and happiness in the open-air nuthouse - the world of sane people.

programme.title: Heavenly Nomadic
programme.desc: A family of nomads dwelling high in the mountains of Kyrgyzstan doesn't need any of the conveniences of modern civilization in order to be happy. But progress is creeping into their lives regardless, destroying legends and traditions as it comes.

programme.title: Midnight At The Paradise
programme.desc: Over the course of one evening, three couples are pulled into a collision course of sexual chemistry, delusion, forgiveness and hope as they explore what love, death, desire and the magic of the movies mean to them.

programme.title: Risk Society
programme.desc: Courier driver Young Gil spirals into debt and desperation after squandering his casino winnings. Having pawned his truck away, Young Gil resorts to stealing a car to get to his fiancée, where a shocking discovery awaits him in the trunk.

programme.title: Top Dogs
programme.desc: A dramedy about two estranged brothers from Normandy. Antoine is happily married with two kids and a successful boat driver, whereas Christian is a globe-trotting hustler. When Antoine becomes involved in sleazy activities, Christian comes to his rescue.

programme.title: Our Children
programme.desc: A doctor brings a boy to Belgium and raises him as his own. When the boy reaches manhood, he gets married and starts his own family, but he still relies on the doctor, his adoptive father. When trouble strikes his family, dependence turns into domination.

programme.title: Hippocrates
programme.desc: Benjamin dreams of being a great doctor, but his internship at his father’s ward doesn’t turn out the way he hoped. His experience as a junior doctor, with its overwhelming responsibility and stiff competition, forces him to confront his limits and fears.

programme.title: The Traveller: The Valley of Fear
programme.desc: In the Basque Country, Captain Yann Kandinsky investigates the disappearance of a young bookseller whose case mirrors a murder from twenty years earlier. All evidence points to the same man—Yves Cesnoz, convicted of the first crime—but Kandinsky believes the real killer is still at large.

programme.title: In His Hands
programme.desc: Clara, a lawyer, leads a serene but monotonous life alongside her husband Damien and their two children. One evening, she succumbs to the charm of a mysterious sculptor. This one scorching night will have dramatic repercussions for her and her family.

programme.title: Pari
programme.desc: Pari, an Iranian mother, goes to Athens with her husband to meet their son studying abroad. When their son is nowhere to be seen, she embarks on a journey in the unfamiliar city where she will uncover more than just her son’s whereabouts.

programme.title: They Say Nothing Stays The Same
programme.desc: Toichi, a solitary river boatman, watches his quiet world shift as a bridge across the river threatens to upend his livelihood. When he takes in a mysterious young girl with nowhere to go, her presence leads him toward unexpected change.

programme.title: #Instalie
programme.desc: Laras is an influencer and Haikal, her faithful boyfriend cum photographer. Together, they’ve amassed a strong legion of adoring fans. However, their picture-perfect relationship is unexpectedly shattered when Haikal meets a mysterious lady at a party.

programme.title: The Traveller: The Naked King
programme.desc: Captain Kandinsky follows the trail of a mysterious notebook linking unsolved crimes. Guided by Commissioner Macena’s clues, Kandinsky begins the hunt for the predator behind all the murders.

programme.title: FBI S6 - EP 8
programme.desc: After an employee of the U.S. Army is shot in an industrial park, the team works to track down the killer who reveals a larger plot at play. Meanwhile, Tiffany continues to struggle with the guilt surrounding Hobbs' death.

With key moments filmed using state-of-the-art bullet time’ 3D time-freezing technology, it is more than a regular game show. It brings blockbuster visuals and Hollywood high tension direct to your living room. Will anyone have what it takes to beat the Cube?

Han Rourou, is the beauty of Huaxiang Street. She is every man's dream girl. Love abounds when these men and women cross paths.

programme.desc: Canelo Alvarez and Mayweather, Torres' goal and Bannister's four minute mile.

programme.title: The Evolution of Sport - Workloads and Lone Wolves - EP4
programme.desc: From the chaotic rules of football to the management of the workload of the NBA and the solitary work of solo sports, endurance and programmes without end shape modern competitions like few other things.

programme.title: Heroines - IOC New Female President - EP13
programme.desc: A new era has opened in the International Olympic Committee with the arrival of Kirsty Coventry as its president, a first for a woman… and it's excellent news for women in sport.

programme.title: Karen on the Rock - Water Fun - EP16
programme.desc: Karen Minier invites you to the heart of the most glamorous events in Monaco! Meet the greatest swimming champions like Michael Phelps, Frédéric Bousquet, Florent Manaudou and Camille Lecourt.

programme.title: Foul Play - The Big Heat - EP30
programme.desc: A case of mistaken identity proves fatal to a baseballing icon, the lies and deceptions of a New York Yankee and a Cincinnati legend's addiction to the game.

programme.title: Invincible - New York Yankees - EP44
programme.desc: The New York Yankees are the most important team in baseball and one of the most famous names in sport.

programme.title: The Iconic - Records - EP28
programme.desc: The most emblematic records of sport, from Don Bradman to Joey Chestnut.

programme.title: Mellodees - The 12 Days of Christmas - EP25
programme.desc: Places! It’s time for the annual HoliDees Pageant! Come sing along to all 12 Days of Christmas!

programme.title: Casper the Friendly Ghost - Casper the Friendly Ghost Ep13 - EP113
programme.desc: Depressed by the antics of the other ghosts, Casper leaves home to make friends. After unintentionally scaring several potential pals, Casper befriends two young children. They take him home, where Casper frightens their mother. Casper is again upset because he believes that he will always scare away his potential buddies. However, Casper scares away a banker who is coming to foreclose on the woman's house, and this wins her heart for Casper.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage - Night Beat - EP114
programme.desc: Tibbs tries to be like Officer Cool, her favourite character from the TV series "Night Beat."

programme.title: The Twisted Tales of Felix the Cat - The Twisted Tales of Felix the Cat Ep1 - EP101
programme.desc: The beyond surreal adventures of Felix The Cat and his friends set in an incredibly weird and fantastical toon world where everything is alive and only dream logic rules. Each episode has three segments.

programme.title: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble - Kidaverse Roblox Rumble Ep3 - EP3
programme.desc: Eight kid gamers, ages eight to twelve, battle it out in ten different Roblox games to win prizes and find out who is the ultimate gamer! Video gamer, football star, and children’s book author Rashad Jennings hosts!

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Behaviors at School - EP103
programme.desc: In this episode of Kids' Planet, Nova will invite the children to a new expedition, this time they will leave for school. Together, they will discover how they should behave in this space that is so important for their development. The children will also learn about their favourite part of the day: recess!

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Behaving on the Street and Minding Traffic Signs - EP104
programme.desc: Nova will invite children to a new expedition to become super pedestrians. Together, they will discover how they should behave in public spaces or streets. Curious will teach us the correct way to cross the street, know the traffic lights and traffic signals. They will also learn that the car is a very fun place that has rules to follow to enjoy and stay safe.

programme.title: Mellodees - Joy to the World - EP24
programme.desc: You’ve never seen a playground like this! Come join Dee and check out some awesome musical instruments!

programme.title: Sunny Bunnies: Get Busy - Sunny Bunnies: Get Busy Ep8 - EP108
programme.desc: In a new spin-off series of mini-episodes - ‘Sunny Bunnies Get Busy’ - the characters are on hand to entertain and engage viewers in various colourful and creative activities and inspire children to 'Get Busy'.

programme.title: Giselle and the Green Team - The Case of the Leopard Elixir - EP108
programme.desc: Nick slick and a bunch of poachers are out hunting leopards in Africa. Now it's time for Gisele and the Green Team to stop them.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage - Big Bad Car - EP104
programme.desc: Klaus's claim of being the fastest car in the world is put to the test.

programme.title: Thomas Edison's Secret Lab - No Volts for Von Bolt / Dunkin’ Zombies - EP104
programme.desc: During a sailing trip, Von Bolt begins to malfunction, endangering ALVA and Edison, so the Secret Lab Kids investigate elements, compounds and alloys to diagnose the problem. / When a virus turns JD into a donut-craving zombie, Angie has to come up with not only a cure, but an inoculation against the virus. Fortunately, Jonas Salk can help.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage - Pizza! Pizza! Pizza! - EP115
programme.desc: Shaq's favourite pizzeria is swamped with orders, luckily the Shaq Paq has nothing better to do that day, so they sign up to help deliver.

programme.title: The Twisted Tales of Felix the Cat - The Twisted Tales of Felix the Cat Ep2 - EP102
programme.desc: The beyond surreal adventures of Felix The Cat and his friends set in an incredibly weird and fantastical toon world where everything is alive and only dream logic rules. Each episode has three segments.

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Generosity and Friendship - EP105
programme.desc: In this new episode of Kids' Planet, Nova will invite the children on a new expedition towards friendship. Together, they will learn about loyalty, respect and understanding. Curious will help us to know how generous people behave, discover empathy, and something very important: how to share with people who need it.

programme.title: Mellodees - The 12 Days of Christmas - EP25
programme.desc: Places! It’s time for the annual HoliDees Pageant! Come sing along to all 12 Days of Christmas!

programme.title: Sunny Bunnies: Get Busy - Sunny Bunnies: Get Busy Ep11 - EP111
programme.desc: In a new spin-off series of mini-episodes - ‘Sunny Bunnies Get Busy’ - the characters are on hand to entertain and engage viewers in various colourful and creative activities and inspire children to 'Get Busy'.

programme.title: Giselle and the Green Team - The Case of the Factory Fishing Fiasco - EP109
programme.desc: Nick Slick has launched a new fishing ship looking to destroy all the fish.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage - The Dawkins Problem - EP105
programme.desc: Someone has hacked Dawkins, It's up to the Shaq Paq to figure out who the culprit is and set things right before it's too late.

programme.title: Thomas Edison's Secret Lab - Murphy’s Law of Gravity / The Mystery of Pirate Woods - EP105
programme.desc: The SECRET LAB KIDS are ready to demo their new science song for web entrepreneur Mook Zookerboom when he learns that a satellite is coming down out of orbit, panics and heads for the airport. So the team must gather some data on gravity to convince him to return. / Angie’s great-uncle Thaddeus and JD are sure a local nautical antique shop has the missing treasure chest of Greybeard the Pirate – but Angie, Nicky and Kent suspect the shop owner is the true pirate here.

programme.title: Midnight At The Paradise
programme.desc: Over the course of one evening, three couples are pulled into a collision course of sexual chemistry, delusion, forgiveness and hope as they explore what love, death, desire and the magic of the movies mean to them.

programme.title: Top Dogs
programme.desc: A dramedy about two estranged brothers from Normandy. Antoine is happily married with two kids and a successful boat driver, whereas Christian is a globe-trotting hustler. When Antoine becomes involved in sleazy activities, Christian comes to his rescue.

programme.title: Hippocrates
programme.desc: Benjamin dreams of being a great doctor, but his internship at his father’s ward doesn’t turn out the way he hoped. His experience as a junior doctor, with its overwhelming responsibility and stiff competition, forces him to confront his limits and fears.

programme.title: In His Hands
programme.desc: Clara, a lawyer, leads a serene but monotonous life alongside her husband Damien and their two children. One evening, she succumbs to the charm of a mysterious sculptor. This one scorching night will have dramatic repercussions for her and her family.

programme.title: Life Feels Good
programme.desc: The true story of Mateusz, a man suffering from cerebral palsy, who in his early childhood had been diagnosed as a retard with no contact with the outside world. After twenty-five years it turned out that he was a perfectly normal and intelligent person.

programme.title: They Say Nothing Stays The Same
programme.desc: Toichi, a solitary river boatman, watches his quiet world shift as a bridge across the river threatens to upend his livelihood. When he takes in a mysterious young girl with nowhere to go, her presence leads him toward unexpected change.

programme.title: A Far Shore
programme.desc: Seventeen-year-old Aoi is an underage mother struggling to make ends meet and dealing with her husband’s violent temper. After her husband loses his job, their continuous fights lead them to a social downfall.

programme.title: Pari
programme.desc: Pari, an Iranian mother, goes to Athens with her husband to meet their son studying abroad. When their son is nowhere to be seen, she embarks on a journey in the unfamiliar city where she will uncover more than just her son’s whereabouts.

programme.title: The Traveller: The Naked King
programme.desc: Captain Kandinsky follows the trail of a mysterious notebook linking unsolved crimes. Guided by Commissioner Macena’s clues, Kandinsky begins the hunt for the predator behind all the murders.

programme.title: #Instalie
programme.desc: Laras is an influencer and Haikal, her faithful boyfriend cum photographer. Together, they’ve amassed a strong legion of adoring fans. However, their picture-perfect relationship is unexpectedly shattered when Haikal meets a mysterious lady at a party.

programme.title: The Breach
programme.desc: A fatal car crash shudders a crisis-torn family. Completely lost and shaken to the core by his wife’s death, the husband undertakes his own investigation and learns the shattering truth about his spouse’s genuine woes and longings.

programme.title: Black As The Snow 2: Dead At The Summit
programme.desc: An SUV races over the cliffs into the depths - the driver is killed instantly. The dead man was apparently involved in a robbery but there is no trace of the loot. French Officer Vivier and Swiss Captain Meyer once again team up to solve the mystery.

programme.title: Secret Delivery
programme.desc: Based on true events. In WWII's snowy Giant Mountains, a group of children help a French pilot escape by moving him between villages. They face enemy soldiers, traitors, and harsh winter while demonstrating courage and friendship.

programme.title: The Traveller: At the End of the Night
programme.desc: Laurent, the brother of Captain Kandinsky, gets into an argument with a young woman who accuses him of harassment. All suspicion inevitably falls on Laurent when she is discovered dead the next day, and it is up to Kandinsky to clear his brother’s name.
